output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-084","author":"ConcernedCitizen_UK","text":"I saw this video circulating on my feed claiming that a simple 7-day juice cleanse can cure Stage 2 breast cancer and replace all chemo. It says the 'detox' is actually better than hospital treatment because it's natural! Please do not try this, as I have a family member currently undergoing therapy and stopping medication could be fatal. Only trust qualified doctors for serious illnesses. #CancerAwareness","category":"Misinformation","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post promotes harmful health misinformation by suggesting a diet replaces medical treatment for cancer.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}"
